# PERF-205 negative: keyset pagination avoids OFFSET
lang: go
file: PERF-205-safe.go
variant: framework
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type Order struct {
	ID uint
}

func ListAfter(db *gorm.DB, lastID uint, size int) ([]Order, error) {
	var orders []Order
	if err := db.Where("id > ?", lastID).Limit(size).Find(&orders).Error; err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	return orders, nil
}
